title: How to Make People Like You in 90 Seconds
author: Nicholas Boothman
subline: The first impression is the lasting impression.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A stopwatch face: full circle with 12 tick marks and three hands. The second hand is RED. Title sits overlaid. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none">
    <!-- Outer circle -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="540" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="520" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- 12 hour ticks (60 minute ticks; major at 12/3/6/9) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-480"/>
      <line x1="270" y1="-467.6" x2="240" y2="-415.7"/>
      <line x1="467.6" y1="-270" x2="415.7" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="540" y1="0" x2="480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="467.6" y1="270" x2="415.7" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="270" y1="467.6" x2="240" y2="415.7"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="540" x2="0" y2="480"/>
      <line x1="-270" y1="467.6" x2="-240" y2="415.7"/>
      <line x1="-467.6" y1="270" x2="-415.7" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-467.6" y1="-270" x2="-415.7" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="-270" y1="-467.6" x2="-240" y2="-415.7"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 60 minute ticks (faint) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-510"/>
      <line x1="90" y1="-532.4" x2="85" y2="-503.0"/>
      <line x1="180" y1="-509.3" x2="170" y2="-481.4"/>
      <line x1="267.6" y1="-467.6" x2="252.7" y2="-442.2"/>
      <line x1="350.2" y1="-411.0" x2="330.8" y2="-388.4"/>
      <line x1="420.2" y1="-340.2" x2="397.0" y2="-321.5"/>
      <line x1="480" y1="-249.6" x2="453.7" y2="-235.8"/>
      <line x1="532.4" y1="-90" x2="503.0" y2="-85"/>
      <line x1="509.3" y1="-180" x2="481.4" y2="-170"/>
      <line x1="467.6" y1="-267.6" x2="442.2" y2="-252.7"/>
      <line x1="411.0" y1="-350.2" x2="388.4" y2="-330.8"/>
      <line x1="340.2" y1="-420.2" x2="321.5" y2="-397.0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hour hand (white, short) pointing to 10 -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-180" y2="-156" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Minute hand (white, long) pointing to 2 -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="207" y2="-358" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Second hand (RED) pointing to 5 (75 degrees clockwise from 12) -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="217" y2="376" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Center pin -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="4" fill="#0a0a0a"/>
    <!-- Top stem and crown of the stopwatch -->
    <rect x="-40" y="-580" width="80" height="40" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="-15" y="-620" width="30" height="40" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 90-second window IS a stopwatch. The cover is a literal stopwatch face: outer circle, hour/minute ticks, hour hand pointing to 10, minute hand to 2, and a RED second hand sweeping to 5. Center pin is red. Top stem and crown. Title sits overlaid in the middle, weight 500 command, mixed-case (3-line stack). Brand '90 SEC' in the bottom-right; pill '1:30' at the bottom — the literal length of the window.
